params.name: VVVVIP Card
params.description: I'll be waiting for you at eight tonight if you have the guts to raid with me! No need to buy anything, you can get all kinds of gear for free! In-game trades are all done within seconds! No cash is involved at all! This is such a cool and beneficial game!
